episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 405: Banned Cards Aplenty
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch, and the guys review the bans in Pioneer and Modern.
